segments.text: Hear my cry, O God; Attend to my prayer.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: From the end of the earth I will cry to You, When my heart is overwhelmed; Lead me to the rock that is higher than I.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: For You have been a shelter for me, A strong tower from the enemy.
I will abide in Your tabernacle forever; I will trust in the shelter of Your wings.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: You have given me the heritage of those who fear Your name.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: You will prolong the king's life, His years as many generations.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: He shall abide before God forever. Oh, prepare mercy and truth, which may preserve him!
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: So I will sing praise to Your name forever, That I may daily perform my vows.
segments.speaker: David
